activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Vitrolife Sweden AB
Box 9080
42132, Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Vitrolife Sweden AB, Box 9080, 400 92 Göteborg, SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' from Sweden in the certificate matches the invoice issuer 'Vitrolife Sweden AB' including address and country after normalization and allowed company suffix removal. The name is explicitly found in the invoice address and header blocks. The country 'Sweden' matches exactly (rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.4).

consignee.certificate_value:
Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd
3-1-601 Jintan Technology park,
Jintan Road,Jinyintan avenue
Dongxihu District Wuhan 430010
China
consignee.invoice_value:
Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.,Ltd
3-1-601 Jintan Technology park,
Jintan Road,Dongxihu District Wuhan
China
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Wuhan New Vision Intl Trade Co.Ltd' from China in the certificate matches the 'Invoice address' and 'Delivery address' in the invoice. Address details and country 'China' match after normalization. The consignee company name is found exactly (rule 4.2.0 and 4.2.3).

goods_description.certificate_value:
Components for culturing media for In Vitro Fertilisation(IVF)
See attached INVOICE NO: 2005620 dated 20250806
goods_description.invoice_value:
Description includes multiple specific components such as G-RINSE™, G-PGD™, EmbryoGlue®, SpermGrad™, etc. with 'Country of Origin: Sweden' explicitly stated
Invoice no: -2005620 dated 2025-08-06
goods_description.motivation: The certificate contains a general goods description with an explicit reference to invoice number 2005620 dated 20250806, which matches the invoice reference exactly. Per rule 4.3.5 this reference allows acceptance of general goods description without exact line match. Article numbers and detailed product descriptions appear in the invoice but are not strictly required to match under this rule.

quantity.motivation: The quantity 14 kolli (14 cartons) in the certificate matches 'Number of cartons: 14' in the invoice. The gross weight 256,30 kg in the certificate matches 'Gross weight (kg): 256,3' in the invoice after normalization with acceptable decimal truncation. Both carton quantity and gross weight verified per 4.4.3.2.

origin.motivation: The certificate origin states 'European Community' and 'Sweden' which is treated as equivalent to 'European Union'. The invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. This satisfies EU origin normalization rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2 and confirms the origin match.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin have been verified as matching under applicable rules and normalizations.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
